class.name: TestDistanceTo3D
class.brief_description: A query test that checks the distance from [QueryItem3D] to a [QueryContext3D].
class.description: A query test that checks the distance from [QueryItem3D] to a [QueryContext3D].

members.member: What context the test will use for the checking the distance. If it's more than one location, then the results are averaged.
Maximum distance. If filtering is enabled, this filters it out.
Minimum distance. If filtering is enabled, this filters it out.
Scoring curve from [member min_distance] to [member max_distance]. Decides how much score each context member applies to the [QueryItem3D]
